name: Vegetarian Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
1/2 Wheat roast, sliced into fajita strips
2 large Garlic cloves, minced
2 tablespoons Fresh lime juice
2 tablespoons Fresh orange juice
2 tablespoons Red wine vinegar
1/4 teaspoon Cayenne pepper
1/2 teaspoon Black pepper
2 tablespoons Brown sugar
3 tablespoons Olive oil
3 tablespoons Chopped fresh cilantro
For sauteed bell peppers and onion:
1 tablespoon Olive oil
1 Each red and yellow bell pepper, sliced into strips
1 medium Onion, sliced
2 teaspoons Red wine vinegar
1/4 teaspoon Salt
1/4 teaspoon Cumin powder
1/4 teaspoon Black pepper
Instructions for fajitas:
1. Mix lime juice, orange juice, vinegar, cayenne pepper, black pepper, and brown sugar in a bowl.
2. Add olive oil and chopped cilantro to the mixture; pour over fajita strips and marinate for at least one hour or overnight.
3. Grill fajita strips or sauté them in a non-stick skillet with a little oil until cooked through.
4. While cooking the fajitas, tightly wrap flour tortillas in foil and heat them in a 300-degree oven for about 10 minutes.
5. To assemble each fajita, place a layer of guacamole on a warm tortilla, add several fajita strips and sautéed bell peppers, and roll up.
6. To make the guacamole, mash the avocados well; stir in lime juice, chopped cilantro, salt, cumin powder, and black pepper.
7. To prepare the sautéed bell peppers and onion, heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add bell peppers and onion, cooking until tender-crisp for about 5 minutes. Stir in vinegar, salt, and sugar before serving.
